title: Dimension and Trace of the Kauffman Bracket Skein Algebra
author_string: Charles Frohman, Joanna Kania-Bartoszynska, Thang Le
abstract: Let $F$ be a finite type surface and $ζ$ a complex root of unity. The Kauffman bracket skein algebra $K_ζ(F)$ is an important object in both classical and quantum topology as it has relations to the character variety, the Teichmüller space, the Jones polynomial, and the Witten-Reshetikhin-Turaev Topological Quantum Field Theories. We compute the rank and trace of $K_ζ(F)$ over its center, and we extend a theorem of Frohman and Kania-Bartoszynska which says the skein algebra has a splitting coming from two pants decompositions of $F$.
comment: 42 pages, 5 figures, fixed typo and metadata
